digest.title_en: Internships for early university / no former employment
digest.title_pt: Internships for early university / no former employment
digest.body_en:
As a rising freshman beginning an undergraduate computer science degree this fall, I wonder what internship opportunities (FOSS preferred) are there, for applicants in early university or who otherwise have no former employment experience (despite, perhaps, contributions to FOSS).

Possible template, adapted from previous t/job posts:

**Company:** XYZ

**Company website:** WWW

**Position(s):** ABC

**Target applicant pool:** XXX (for example, "graduating in 2030", "any undergraduate pursuing a degree in CS/etc", etc.)

**Duration:** XXX

**Location:** XXX (please include whether REMOTE worldwide/US/EU/etc or ONSITE)

**Description:** XYZ

**Tech stack:** ABC

**Compensation:** XXX

**Contacts:** WWW

I think comments other than listings (e.g., advice and such) should also be welcome here!

Tags: `ask`, `job` · Author: **runxiyu** Community buzz: **42** points, **17** comments, via **Lobsters**. Check the original source below for the full story.
digest.body_pt:
As a rising freshman beginning an undergraduate computer science degree this fall, I wonder what internship opportunities (FOSS preferred) are there, for applicants in early university or who otherwise have no former employment experience (despite, perhaps, contributions to FOSS).

Possible template, adapted from previous t/job posts:

**Company:** XYZ

**Company website:** WWW

**Position(s):** ABC

**Target applicant pool:** XXX (for example, "graduating in 2030", "any undergraduate pursuing a degree in CS/etc", etc.)

**Duration:** XXX

**Location:** XXX (please include whether REMOTE worldwide/US/EU/etc or ONSITE)

**Description:** XYZ

**Tech stack:** ABC

**Compensation:** XXX

**Contacts:** WWW

I think comments other than listings (e.g., advice and such) should also be welcome here!

Tags: `ask`, `job` · Autor: **runxiyu** Repercussão: **42** pontos, **17** comentários, via **Lobsters**. Confira a fonte original abaixo para a matéria completa.

articles.title: Internships for early university / no former employment
articles.description:
As a rising freshman beginning an undergraduate computer science degree this fall, I wonder what internship opportunities (FOSS preferred) are there, for applicants in early university or who otherwise have no former employment experience (despite, perhaps, contributions to FOSS).

Possible template, adapted from previous t/job posts:

**Company:** XYZ

**Company website:** WWW

**Position(s):** ABC

**Target applicant pool:** XXX (for example, "graduating in 2030", "any undergraduate pursuing a degree in CS/etc", etc.)

**Duration:** XXX

**Location:** XXX (please include whether REMOTE worldwide/US/EU/etc or ONSITE)

**Description:** XYZ

**Tech stack:** ABC

**Compensation:** XXX

**Contacts:** WWW

I think comments other than listings (e.g., advice and such) should also be welcome here!
